name: Tally of the Damned
text:
Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, that opponent loses 1 life and you put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. The ledger of sins fills itself.
At the beginning of your end step, if there are eight or more doom counters on the Doomsday Clock, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
flavorText: Every wager, every gamble, every lucky toss — all of it goes in the book. The book is very full.
